parameters.content:
## HLRS — Due Date Reminder
Fill the PLACEHOLDERS before enabling:
- **host** `YOUR_PLANE_BASE` → both HTTP node URLs and Code `WEB_BASE`
- **`YOUR_PLANE_API_KEY`** → Plane token (X-API-Key) in both HTTP nodes
- workspace slug = `hijra`, project id = `6328c439-cf0b-4e44-b779-73c82201fa29` — already hardcoded

### Send Email (SMTP) node
Attach an **SMTP credential**. `From` is set to **legalhijra@hijra.id** in the node (editable). Make sure the SMTP server/account is allowed to send as that address.

### Fetch work items
Single `GET /issues/?per_page=1000&expand=assignees,state` — this instance returns a whole project in one page (verified: largest here is HLRS=404), so no pagination is needed. `/work-items/` 404s here, so `/issues/` is used. If a project ever exceeds 1000 issues the Build node warns and the digest shows a banner — re-add cursor pagination then.

### Schedule
Daily at **08:00 Asia/Jakarta** (workflow timezone set on Settings).

One email per ticket **due today**, to each assignee. Unassigned tickets and completed/cancelled states are skipped. (Zero due-today tickets -> the Code node shows one empty item and no mail is sent — that is expected.)
